description: Reviewer decisions for Open Targets context facts. Facts default to context-only until a reviewer records keep_context, rejected, or promoted_for_severity with required metadata.

decisions.rationale: Classic high-actionability Abacavir/HLA-B hypersensitivity relationship; keep Open Targets rows non-scoring while creating a Diognosis evidence task.
High-actionability Clopidogrel/CYP2C19 activation relationship; candidate for Diognosis evidence review, not automatic promotion.
High-actionability Capecitabine/DPYD toxicity relationship; candidate for Diognosis evidence review, not automatic promotion.
High-actionability Warfarin/CYP2C9 dosing sensitivity relationship; candidate for Diognosis evidence review.
High-actionability Warfarin/VKORC1 dosing sensitivity relationship; candidate for Diognosis evidence review.
High-actionability Codeine/CYP2D6 prodrug activation relationship; candidate for Diognosis evidence review.
Drug-warning records are useful safety context but require label-level Diognosis review before affecting warning severity.
FAERS disproportionality signals remain context only because indication, reporting, and co-medication confounding are unresolved.
Target-safety liabilities are mechanistic review prompts, not direct interaction or severity evidence.
Remaining ClinPGx rows are retained as context until a drug-gene-specific Diognosis evidence review is opened.
